hero.title2: Live a day in the life
hero.subtitle1: Homestays, local experiences, and local companions —
hero.subtitle2: step into the real everyday life of Korea.

trust.title: Designed for Your Peace of Mind
trust.subtitle: Safe and comfortable, whether it's your first time or you're traveling solo.
trust.item1Desc: Your first meetup is always at a public place like a cafe. Feel safe from the start.
trust.item2Desc: Booking and inquiries via LINE are available in Japanese. During the experience, communicate with your host using a translation app.
trust.item3Desc: No packed schedules. Stay comfortable, and feel free to stop anytime.

services.title: Experiences
services.subtitle: Not tourist spots. Just ordinary Korean daily life, together.
services.homestayDesc: Experience life in a Korean local's space. Have breakfast together, take a walk around the neighborhood. A taste of real daily life you can't get from tourism.
services.localDesc: Supermarkets, convenience store snacks, cafes, karaoke, neighborhood walks... Enjoy everyday Korean life with a local, beyond the guidebooks.
services.companionDesc: Don't worry if you don't speak Korean. Using a translation app is perfectly fine. It's the time spent together that matters most, not the language.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: 3 simple steps to real Korean daily life.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Send us a message on LINE. Tell us your dates and what kind of experience you'd like. We respond in Japanese and English.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We'll introduce you to a local Korean host that fits you. First meetup is always at a safe, public place like a cafe.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Walk the streets, share a meal. Enjoy an ordinary Korean day together.

testimonials.title: What People Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from KoreaChan participants.
testimonials.r1Text: I was nervous traveling alone, but picking snacks at a convenience store and chatting at a cafe with a local — it felt like I made a real friend in Korea.
testimonials.r2Text: We used a translation app the whole time, but it wasn't awkward at all. Laughing together was so much fun — I definitely want to do this again.
testimonials.r3Text: I've been to Korea many times but always did the same tourist stuff. KoreaChan took me to a local's favorite spots — it was a completely different Korea.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Have questions? Feel free to reach out on LINE.
faq.a1: Yes. LINE consultations are available in Japanese. During the experience, you can communicate with your host using a translation app. Even if words aren't perfect, the time spent together is the most valuable part.
faq.a2: Absolutely. Most participants are solo travelers. Your local host will be with you, so you won't feel lonely.
faq.a3: The first meeting is always at a public place like a cafe. Hosts are pre-screened and interviewed. You can go at your own pace and stop anytime.
faq.a4: It depends on the experience. Send us your preferences on LINE and we'll provide a quote.
faq.a5: Yes. Cancellations follow our cancellation policy. Contact us on LINE for details. A deposit may be required to prevent no-shows.
faq.q6: What kind of experiences are available?
faq.a6: Cafe hopping, grocery shopping, convenience store late-night snacks, karaoke, neighborhood walks — everyday Korean life. We can customize based on your preferences.

finalCta.subtitle1: Send us a message on LINE to get started.
finalCta.subtitle2: Check availability or ask about experiences — we reply in Japanese and English.
